titleEn: The North Wind and the Sun
summaryAm: በጉዞ ላይ ያለ ሰው ላይ ኃይል እና ርኅራኄ ሲፈተኑ የሚያሳይ ለልጆች የተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: ለሰዎች በቀስታ እና በደግነት መቅረብ ከመግፋት ይሻላል።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation.

pages.textAm: በአንድ ቀን ሰሜን ነፋስ እና ፀሐይ በሰማይ ላይ ተገናኙ። ከታች አንድ ተጓዥ ኮቱን ለብሶ በመንገድ ይሄድ ነበር።
pages.textEn: One day the North Wind and the Sun saw a traveler walking with a coat.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A friendly sun and soft north wind watch a traveler walking on a quiet path.

pages.textAm: ነፋሱ “እኔ በጣም ኃይለኛ ነኝ፤ ኮቱን በፍጥነት አስወልቃለሁ” አለ። ፀሐይ ግን “በትንሽ ሙቀት እና በትዕግሥት እንመልከት” አለች።
pages.textEn: The wind wanted to use strength, while the sun suggested patience.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The wind speaks proudly while the sun smiles calmly above the path.

pages.textAm: ነፋሱ በጣም መንፋት ጀመረ። ቅጠሎች ተንቀሳቀሱ፣ ተጓዡም ኮቱን በሁለት እጆቹ ጠበቀ።
pages.textEn: The wind blew hard, and the traveler held his coat tightly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Leaves swirl gently as the traveler holds his coat close, still safe and calm.

pages.textAm: ነፋሱ ይበልጥ እየነፈሰ ሄደ። ግን ተጓዡ ብርድ ሲሰማው ኮቱን ይበልጥ አጠበቀ።
pages.textEn: The harder the wind blew, the tighter the traveler kept his coat.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The traveler wraps his coat tighter while the wind looks puzzled.

pages.textAm: ከጥቂት ጊዜ በኋላ ነፋሱ ደከመ። “አሁን አንቺ ሞክሪ” ብሎ ለፀሐይ ቦታ ሰጠ።
pages.textEn: After a while, the wind grew tired and let the sun try.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The wind rests beside soft clouds while the sun prepares to shine warmly.

pages.textAm: ፀሐይ በቀስታ በሞቃት ብርሃን አበራች። መንገዱ ተሞቀ፣ ተጓዡም ፈገግ አለ።
pages.textEn: The sun shone gently, and the traveler began to feel warm.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm sunlight fills the path as the traveler smiles comfortably.

pages.textAm: ተጓዡ “አሁን ሞቃት ሆነ” ብሎ ኮቱን በጸጥታ አወለቀ። በዛፍ ጥላ ሥርም ትንሽ አረፈ።
pages.textEn: Feeling warm, the traveler took off his coat and rested in the shade.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The traveler removes his coat peacefully and rests under a small tree.

pages.textAm: ነፋሱ ተማረ። “እውነት ነው፣ ቀስታ እና ደግነት ብዙ ነገር ያደርጋሉ” አለ። ፀሐይም በለስላሳ ብርሃን ቀጠለች።
pages.textEn: The wind learned that gentleness and kindness can do a great deal.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The wind and sun share a peaceful lesson above a warm storybook path.
